nasb.text: It was paneled with cedar above the side chambers which were on the 45 pillars, 15 in each row.

esv.text: And it was covered with cedar above the chambers that were on the forty-five pillars, fifteen in each row.

cnv.text: 柱子每行十五根，共四十五根；柱子上有廂房，是用香柏木蓋屋頂的。

ccb.text: 每一行木柱有十五根，共四十五根。殿顶铺香柏木板。
